definitions.name: filter:where:PATIENT.PAT_ID
definitions.pattern: p.PAT_ID IN (SELECT DISTINCT e.PAT_ID FROM PAT_ENC_HSP AS e JOIN HSP_ACCT_DX_LIST AS dl ON e.HSP_ACCOUNT_ID = dl.HSP_ACCOUNT_ID JOIN CLARITY_EDG AS dx ON dl.DX_ID = dx.DX_ID WHERE dx.ICD10_CODE LIKE 'I50%')
definitions.normalized_expression: patient.pat_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT pat_enc_hsp.pat_id FROM pat_enc_hsp AS e JOIN hsp_acct_dx_list AS dl ON pat_enc_hsp.hsp_account_id = hsp_acct_dx_list.hsp_account_id JOIN clarity_edg AS dx ON hsp_acct_dx_list.dx_id = clarity_edg.dx_id WHERE clarity_edg.icd10_code LIKE 'I50%')
